claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: "Revenue Intelligence Meets Real-Time Action" clearly states the value proposition on the homepage.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage contains a link labeled 'Pricing' that can be clicked to access the pricing page.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: "Take a Platform Tour" and "See Clari in action" suggest that there are accessible demos.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Clari seamlessly integrates with the tools you rely on, from CRM and customer engagement platforms to data and security systems.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Clari agrees that it will collect, store and process my personal data in accordance with the terms of service and privacy policy.
